documentation_impact.rationale: Phase 4 dogfood feature-delivery intake closure. The intake-analyst folded the operator's round-1 answers into the canonical Engineering Spec, refreshed the feature index for the tech-lead handoff, and updated the intake handoff note. The operator response file is committed alongside as the canonical, semantically immutable input cited by the closed spec. No round-2 dialogue is opened: the intake-analyst resolved residual ambiguities from context (inbox/threads parent folders, collision counter format, handbook surface, work subdirectory naming) and deferred the migration timestamp-source ordering to the plan stage. Spec status is intake-closed, awaiting the human_approval ratification gate that gates dispatch of tech-lead.

deferred_items.rationale: Operator deferred the post-2500-01-01 sentinel rollover rule by explicit decision; the spec records it under Deferrals and removes the corresponding open clarify marker.

Selecting between filesystem mtime, first git commit timestamp, content-frontmatter created_at, or operator override for artifacts that lack an authoritative creation time is a plan-stage implementation choice and does not block intake closure.
feature-delivery plan stage is gated on the human_approval ratification of the closed Engineering Spec; tech-lead dispatch is deferred until that gate clears.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Slice delegates the intake stage to the named intake-analyst persona per §4 and stops cleanly at the human_approval gate that follows spec emission per the working agreement.
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Slice keeps every emitted artifact dual-anchored, preserves inbox lifecycle semantic-immutability rules, and bundles the canonical operator response file with the spec that cites it.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Slice closes the dogfood-us1 todo's intake stage by emitting a canonical Engineering Spec for tech-lead handoff without expanding scope past the intake artifact set.
